hooks.command: f=$(python -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); case "$f" in *.py) uv run ruff check --fix "$f"; uv run ruff format "$f";; esac; true

f=$(python -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); bn=$(basename "$f"); case "$bn" in .env*|*.pem|*.key|credentials.json) echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Blocked: secret/credential file ($bn)\"}}";; esac
